items.title: Avengers: Doomsday
items.overview: Beloved heroes from three distinct universes are set on a deadly collision course and face an existential threat unlike anything they've ever encountered.

items.title: Avengers: Secret Wars
items.overview: An upcoming film in Phase Six of the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) and the finale of The Multiverse Saga. Plot TBA.

items.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
items.tagline: A brand new day starts now.
items.overview: Four years have passed since the events of No Way Home, and Peter is now an adult living entirely alone, having voluntarily erased himself from the lives and memories of those he loves. Crime-fighting in a New York that no longer knows his name, he's devoted himself entirely to protecting his city — a full-time Spider-Man — but as the demands on him intensify, the pressure sparks a surprising physical evolution that threatens his existence, even as a strange new pattern of crimes gives rise to one of the most powerful threats he has ever faced.

items.title: Dune: Part Three
items.overview: As Emperor, Paul Atreides grapples with the consequences of his rise to power as political conspiracies and a galaxy-spanning holy war threaten the future he alone can foresee.

items.title: Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse
items.overview: Hunted by Miguel O'Hara's Spider Society and betrayed by his friends, Miles finds himself in the darkest corners of the Spider-Verse in search of a way home. Knowing that his family has been not only fractured but endangered by his calling, it's a race against the clock for Miles to travel across the wildest reaches of time and space to fight for and reunite everything he holds most dear.

items.title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu
items.tagline: If you're searching for new adventure, "this is the way."
items.overview: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.
items.original_title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu

items.title: The Odyssey
items.overview: Odysseus, the legendary Greek king of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War, chronicling his encounters with mythical beings such as the Cyclops Polyphemus, the Sirens, and the witch-goddess Circe, while attempting to reunite with his wife, Penelope.

items.title: Shrek 5
items.overview: The fifth film in the Shrek franchise. Plot TBA.

items.title: Masters of the Universe
items.overview: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela and Duncan/Man-At-Arms, and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.

items.title: Supergirl
items.overview: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

items.title: Toy Story 5
items.overview: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.

items.title: Mortal Kombat II
items.overview: The fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

items.title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping
items.tagline: Welcome to the Second Quarter Quell.
items.overview: Return to the world of Panem 24 years before the events of The Hunger Games, starting on the morning of the reaping of the 50th Hunger Games, also known as the Second Quarter Quell.
items.original_title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping

items.title: Disclosure Day
items.overview: If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you?

items.title: Moana
items.tagline: The ocean chose her for a reason.
items.overview: Prompted by a summons from the ocean, Moana departs her home island of Motunui for the first time and travels past its barrier reef. Accompanied by the demigod Maui, she undertakes a voyage aimed at recovering the well-being of her community.

items.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
items.overview: Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly desperately needs.

items.title: Avatar: Aang, The Last Airbender
items.overview: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

items.title: Jumanji: Open World
items.overview: Our heroes have escaped the ever-changing jungles of Jumanji before, but this time the game comes to us - as Jumanji breaks free of its console, unleashing its chaos into our world.

items.title: Scary Movie
items.overview: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.

items.title: Minions & Monsters
items.overview: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

items.title: In the Grey
items.tagline: When billions get stolen, they are the pros who steal it back.
items.overview: When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, a covert team of elite operatives who live in the global shadows, as comfortable wielding power and influence as they are automatic weapons and high explosives, is sent to steal it back on what would be for anyone else a suicide mission. What begins as an impossible heist gets much worse, spiraling into an all-out war of strategy, deception and survival.

items.title: Frozen III
items.overview: Third installment in the Disney animated franchise. Plot TBA

items.title: Street Fighter
items.overview: In 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu and Ken Masters are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don't, it's GAME OVER!

items.title: Narnia
items.overview: The new upcoming film by Greta Gerwig.

items.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 4
items.tagline: The countdown to chaos has begun.
items.overview: The fourth installment in the Sonic the Hedgehog film franchise. Plot TBA.

items.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
items.tagline: To find peace, he will lose it.
items.overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.

items.title: The End of Oak Street
items.overview: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, a family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

items.title: Backrooms
items.overview: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

items.title: Insidious: Out of the Further
items.overview: A trio of stalkers infiltrate a quiet suburb and force a new family into the astral plane, where they uncover a terrifying truth: the Further is bleeding into the real world.

items.title: The Sheep Detectives
items.overview: George is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep realize they must become the detectives. As they follow the clues and investigate human suspects, they prove that even sheep can be brilliant crime-solvers.

items.title: Star Wars: Starfighter
items.overview: An original story set approximately five years after the events of Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker.

items.title: Resident Evil
items.overview: A hapless courier tasked with delivering a package to a remote hospital finds himself caught in the middle of an outbreak and must fight through hordes of mutated creatures to survive.

items.title: Ice Age: Boiling Point
items.overview: A dinosaur-and-lava-filled madcap adventure that takes Manny, Sid, Diego, Ellie, Scrat and the rest of the herd to visit never-before-seen corners of the treacherous Lost World.

items.title: The Death of Robin Hood
items.overview: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chance at salvation.

items.title: Obsession
items.tagline: Be careful who you wish for…
items.overview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

items.title: Clayface
items.overview: After his face is disfigured, struggling actor Matt Hagen undergoes a scientific transformation that turns his body entirely into clay.

items.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum
items.overview: Set between The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings trilogies, Strider and Gandalf search for the corrupted Hobbit Gollum to learn more information about Bilbo Baggins' ring.
items.original_title: The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum

items.title: Apex
items.overview: A grieving woman pushing her limits on a solo adventure in the Australian wild is ensnared in a twisted game with a cunning killer who thinks she's prey.

items.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem 2
items.overview: Donnie, Raph, Leo, and Mikey are back for their next adventure with Master Splinter, the Mutants, April, and a new villain they have to face: The Shredder.
items.original_title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem 2

items.title: Coyote vs. Acme
items.tagline: The movie Acme doesn't want you to see.
items.overview: After Acme products fail him one too many times in his dogged pursuit of the Roadrunner, Wile E. Coyote decides to hire a billboard lawyer to sue the Acme Corporation.

items.title: Godzilla x Kong: Supernova
items.overview: Features several new human characters alongside the beloved and iconic Titans Godzilla and Kong as they face off against a cataclysmic world-ending threat. Plot TBA.

items.title: The Legend of Zelda
items.overview: A live-action adaptation of the Legend of Zelda video game series.

items.title: Violent Night 2
items.overview: The sequel to the 2022 film. Plot TBA.

items.title: Mutiny
items.overview: After witnessing his billionaire boss' murder and being framed for the crime, Cole Reed boards a cargo ship on a one-man crusade to avenge his boss' death only to discover an international conspiracy.

items.title: Digger
items.overview: The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity's saviour before the disaster he’s unleashed destroys everything.

items.title: The Beekeeper 2
items.overview: The second installment in the franchise. Plot TBA.

items.title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
items.overview: When an international covert mission unravels a deadly conspiracy, Ryan is forced back into the world of espionage to confront a rogue black-ops unit.
items.original_title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War

items.title: The Angry Birds Movie 3
items.overview: The third installment in The Angry Birds Movie franchise. Plot TBA

items.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
items.overview: The second live-action adaptation of the animated trilogy. Plot TBA.

items.title: A Quiet Place Part III
items.overview: The third installment in the franchise. Plot TBA.
